steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize orthoclase's Mohs scale number — so the sentence must center on orthoclase having a Mohs number of $6$ and what that means.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
The correct response leads with orthoclase's number ($6$) and uses fluorite ($4$) and corundum ($9$) to contextualize what that number means.
  • A omits orthoclase entirely
  • C lists three minerals abstractly without giving orthoclase's number
  • D centers on corundum
, not orthoclase.

That confirms B is correct.
